tasks.name: buildIfNeeded
args: GRADLE_BUILD_TIMESTAMP=$(find app/src -type f -name '*.kt' -o -name '*.xml' -o -name '*.gradle' | xargs stat -f '%m' 2>/dev/null | sort -n | tail -1); BUILD_CACHE=.gradle_build_cache; if [ -f $BUILD_CACHE ]; then LAST_BUILD=$(cat $BUILD_CACHE); if [ "$GRADLE_BUILD_TIMESTAMP" -gt "$LAST_BUILD" ]; then bash ./gradlew assembleDebug && echo $GRADLE_BUILD_TIMESTAMP > $BUILD_CACHE; fi; else bash ./gradlew assembleDebug && echo $GRADLE_BUILD_TIMESTAMP > $BUILD_CACHE; fi
